response.justification: Solid 14+ year engineering career with strong full-stack and TypeScript/Node.js background, plus recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI delivery — no explicit experience with RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI. Customer-facing technical leadership and cloud-platform AI system design are also not clearly evidenced beyond general senior IC work.
strengths: 14+ years of production software engineering with strong TypeScript/Node.js depth
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Track record of mentoring, workshops, and developer tooling — fits FDE soft skills
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Missing evidence of customer-facing discovery/leadership typical for Forward Deployed roles
Cloud platform AI system design (AWS/GCP/Azure) not clearly demonstrated; only AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: Missing core GenAI stack (RAG, vector DBs, evals)
Recent AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
Strong senior IC tenure with TypeScript/Node.js
